title: Complete hiring decision for Senior Engineer role
description: Make final hire/no-hire decision for Jordan Lee and Sam Patel. Present recommendation at Thursday hiring committee.
notes: Jordan has competing offer expiring Friday. Must decide by Thursday.

title: Schedule offer call with selected candidate
description: Once hiring decision is made, coordinate with recruiting to schedule the offer call.
notes: Tentative slot Friday 2pm. Depends on committee decision.

title: Back-channel reference check — Jordan Lee
description: Conduct informal reference check via Dave Wilson's LinkedIn connection at Jordan's previous company.
notes: Initiated by recruiting via Dave's connection. Jordan was NOT informed of this outreach.

title: Update job posting for remaining headcount
description: After this hire, we have 1 more headcount approved. Update the posting based on lessons from this round.

title: Prepare onboarding plan for new Senior Engineer
description: Set up onboarding doc, buddy assignment, first-week schedule for whoever is hired.
notes: Don't start until offer is accepted.
